AfricaOnly Daily

Die 2 neuesten Videos von AfricaOnly.tv auf YouTube

Letztes Update: 11. Juli 2026 · täglich um 10:00 Uhr (Europe/Berlin)

18. Juni 2026

AO x NTS Radio - Ep 4: Kenyan Underground

Played live on NTS Radio on 18/04/26 Africa Only is an ongoing cultural and musical project exploring underground sounds, scenes and artistic movements across the African continent and the diaspora. Curated by the artist Paxslim, the series highlights artists, communities and sonic histories rooted in African and Afro-diasporic identity. Each episode focuses on a different scene, bringing together music, research and storytelling to spotlight emerging and influential voices shaping contemporary underground culture. Paxslims Africa Only Radio Episode 4 explores the Kenyan underground scene. Featuring selections from artist and DJ Lilmaina, model, creative and stylist Asha, storyteller and Escape Plan founder Amari Moto, and creative director, designer and stylist Rosemary. Mixed by Haram, Paxslim's longtime producer.

24. Mai 2026

AO x NTS Radio - Ep 3: Tanzanian Underground

Africa Only is an ongoing cultural and musical project exploring underground sounds, scenes and artistic movements across the African continent and the diaspora. Curated by the artist Paxslim, the series highlights artists, communities and sonic histories rooted in African and Afro-diasporic identity. Each episode focuses on a different scene, bringing together music, research and storytelling to spotlight emerging and influential voices shaping contemporary underground culture. Paxslims Africa Only Radio Episode 3 explores the Tanzanian underground scene. Featuring Sekera, a director, musician and model, Ivana, a writer and creative director, Cloud B, a music producer and farmer, and BM, who each share tracks highlighting emerging artists and sounds shaping the scene.

Quelle: YouTube RSS Feed für @africaonlytv
